name: skill-ledger
description: Cross-harness skill usage auditing with Chinese Markdown reports.

interface.shortDescription: Record skill usage and generate Chinese audit reports.
interface.longDescription: Skill Ledger records which skills were discovered and called during a task, then writes a Chinese Markdown report for skill tuning across Codex, OpenCode, Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot CLI, Gemini, Kimi Code, Pi, Antigravity, Factory Droid, and related coding agents.
defaultPrompt: Start auditing skill usage for this task.
